package service

import "sync"

type Cache struct {
	mu     sync.RWMutex
	values []string
}

func (c *Cache) StoreAll(items []string) error {
	var wg sync.WaitGroup
	errCh := make(chan error, len(items))
	for _, item := range items {
		wg.Add(1)
		go func(v string) {
			defer wg.Done()
			if err := persist(v); err != nil {
				errCh <- err
			}
		}(item)
	}
	wg.Wait()
	close(errCh)
	c.mu.Lock()
	c.values = append(c.values, "done")
	c.mu.Unlock()
	return nil
}

func persist(v string) error { return nil }
